items.headline_en: Every Gradio Space now auto-serves an /agents
items.summary_en: Hugging Face changelog updated. Latest entry: "Every Gradio Space now auto-serves an /agents.".
items.evidence_excerpt: Changelog Keep track of latest changes on the Hugging Face Hub Apr 17, 26 Upvote 149 +144 Apr 17, 26 Spaces agents.md for your coding agents Upvote 149 +144 Every Gradio Space now auto-serves an /agents.md endpoint, a machine-readable API description that AI agents can read and call directly. Point your coding agents (like Claude Code, Codex, or Pi) at it and they figure out how to use the Space without any setup. Read the documentation to learn more. Apr 15, 26 Upvote 152 +147 Apr 15, 26 Introducing Kernels Upvote 152 +147 Kernels repositories provide an easy way to use kernels: precompiled, optimized for your exact hardware and PyTorch version, ready for torch.compile, and yields 1.7–2.5× speed-ups over baseline PyTorch. You can now browse and load Kernels from the Kernels Hub . Apr 1...
diff_excerpt: -Changelog Keep track of latest changes on the Hugging Face Hub Apr 17, 26 Upvote 149 +144 Apr 17, 26 Spaces agents.md for your coding agents Upvote 149 +144 Every Gradio Space now auto-serves an /agents.md endpoint, a machine-readable API description that AI agents can read and call directly. Point your coding agents (like Claude Code, Codex, or Pi) at it and they figure out how to use the Space without any setup. Read the documentation to learn more. Apr 15, 26 Upvote 151 +146 Apr 15, 26 Introducing Kernels Upvote 151 +146 Kernels repositories provide an easy way to use kernels: precompiled, optimized for your exact hardware and PyTorch version, ready for torch.compile, and yields 1.7–2.5× speed-ups over baseline PyTorch. You can now browse and load Kernels from the Kernels Hub . Apr 10, 26 Upvote 132 +127 Apr 10, 26 ZeroGPU overquota Upvote 132 +127 PRO users can now continue using ZeroGPU Spaces above their daily included quota. Over-quota usage requires purchasing pre-paid credits. The price is $1 per 10 minutes of over-quota ZeroGPU usage. Apr 7, 26 Upvote 117 +112 Apr 7, 26 Agent Traces on the Hub Upvote 117 +112 You can now upload traces from your agents ( Claude Code , Codex , Pi ) directly to Hugging Face Datasets. The Hub auto-detects trace formats and tags your dataset as Traces , with a dedicated viewer for browsing sessions, turns, tool calls, and model responses. No preprocessing needed, just upload the JSONL files from your local session directories as-is: Agent Local session directory Claude Code ~/.claude/projects Codex ~/.codex/sessions Pi ~/.pi/agent/sessions Useful for sharing debugging workflows, benchmarking agent behavior across models, or building training data from real coding sessions. Mar 31, 26 Upvote 129 +124 Mar 31, 26 Storage Buckets for Spaces Upvote 129 +124 You can now mount HF Buckets as persistent storage volumes directly in your Spaces . In Space settings, the new "Storage Buckets" section lets you create or select a bucket, set the mount path and access mode. You can also attach a bucket when creating a new Space. Useful for caching model weights, storing user uploads, or sharing files between Spaces under the same organization. Previous 1 2 3 ... 10 Next

+Changelog Keep track of latest changes on the Hugging Face Hub Apr 17, 26 Upvote 149 +144 Apr 17, 26 Spaces agents.md for your coding agents Upvote 149 +144 Every Gradio Space now auto-serves an /agents.md endpoint, a machine-readable API description that AI agents can read and call directly. Point your coding agents (like Claude Code, Codex, or Pi) at it and they figure out how to use the Space without any setup. Read the documentation to learn more. Apr 15, 26 Upvote 152 +147 Apr 15, 26 Introducing Kernels Upvote 152 +147 Kernels repositories provide an easy way to use kernels: precompiled, optimized for your exact hardware and PyTorch version, ready for torch.compile, and yields 1.7–2.5× speed-ups over baseline PyTorch. You can now browse and load Kernels from the Kernels Hub . Apr 10, 26 Upvote 132 +127 Apr 10, 26 ZeroGPU overquota Upvote 132 +127 PRO users can now continue using ZeroGPU Spaces above their daily included quota. Over-quota usage requires purchasing pre-paid credits. The price is $1 per 10 minutes of over-quota ZeroGPU usage. Apr 7, 26 Upvote 117 +112 Apr 7, 26 Agent Traces on the Hub Upvote 117 +112 You can now upload traces from your agents ( Claude Code , Codex , Pi ) directly to Hugging Face Datasets. The Hub auto-detects trace formats and tags your dataset as Traces , with a dedicated viewer for browsing sessions, turns, tool calls, and model responses. No preprocessing needed, just upload the JSONL files from your local session directories as-is: Agent Local session directory Claude Code ~/.claude/projects Codex ~/.codex/sessions Pi ~/.pi/agent/sessions Useful for sharing debugging workflows, benchmarking agent behavior across models, or building training data from real coding sessions. Mar 31, 26 Upvote 129 +124 Mar 31, 26 Storage Buckets for Spaces Upvote 129 +124 You can now mount HF Buckets as persistent storage volumes directly in your Spaces . In Space settings, the new "Storage Buckets" section lets you create or select a bucket, set the mount path and access mode. You can also attach a bucket when creating a new Space. Useful for caching model weights, storing user uploads, or sharing files between Spaces under the same organization. Previous 1 2 3 ... 10 Next

items.summary_en: DeepSeek homepage updated with information about DeepSeek-V4.
items.evidence_excerpt: 🎉 DeepSeek-V4 预览版本发布，具备世界顶级推理性能，Agent 能力大幅提高，已在网页端、APP 和 API 上线，点击查看详情。 探索未至之境 开始对话 与 DeepSeek 免费对话 体验全新旗舰模型 API 开放平台 调用 DeepSeek 最新模型 快速集成、流畅体验 获取手机 App English © 2026 杭州深度求索人工智能基础技术研究有限公司 版权所有 浙ICP备2023025841号 浙B2-20250178 浙公网安备33010502011812号 研究 DeepSeek R1 DeepSeek V3 DeepSeek Coder V2 DeepSeek VL DeepSeek V2 DeepSeek Coder DeepSeek Math DeepSeek LLM 产品 DeepSeek App DeepSeek 网页版 开放平台 API 价格 服务状态 法务 & 安全 隐私政策 用户协议 反馈安全漏洞 透明度 加入我们 岗位详情
